base_personality: Hardworking and plain-spoken, the farmer values honest labor and fair dealings above all. Distrustful of smooth talkers and outsiders at first, but loyal once friendship is earned. Pragmatic to a fault.

scripted_dialogue.greeting: Hm? Oh, hello there. Can't chat long — the crops won't tend themselves, you know.
scripted_dialogue.quest_hint: Strange things been happening out in the fields lately. Crops wilting where they shouldn't, odd tracks in the dirt. Something ain't right.
scripted_dialogue.hostile: I don't deal with liars and thieves. Get off my land before I put this pitchfork to a different use.

greeting: Morning. Or is it afternoon already? Lose track of time out here.
Hey there. What d'you need? I've got work to finish.
Oh, it's you again. Pull up a fence post and talk, I suppose.
ask_info: I just know farming, friend. But I keep my eyes open — ask away.
Not much happens here I don't notice, long as it's near the fields.
Hmm, I might've heard something about that. Let me think...
unknown: Sorry, I don't know nothing about that. Try the elder, maybe.
That's above my head, I'm afraid. I'm just a farmer.
Can't help you there. Now if you'll excuse me, these rows need hoeing.
